title: Series index
description: Array of series entries. Each entry is a project/series with ordered blog post parts.

id.description: Unique identifier. Must match the filename convention and be referenced by blog post frontmatter via series: field.

title.description: Human-readable series title. Used in nav breadcrumbs, series index page, and JSON-LD ItemList name.

slug.description: URL segment for /series/[slug]. Must be URL-safe. Changing this after publication is a breaking change.

description.description: Short description of the series. Used in meta tags, og:description, and series index page.

publishedAt.description: ISO 8601 date when the first part was published. Set once — never updated.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date bumped manually each time a new part is published. Used as the sort key in feed queries.

order.description: Slugs of published parts in reading order (pt1 first). Never list a slug without a corresponding .mdx file.

status.description: active: series is in progress. completed: no further parts planned.

repoUrl.description: Optional link to the source repository associated with this series.

demoUrl.description: Optional link to a live demo associated with this series.

ogImage.description: Optional path to an OG image override for this series. Relative to /public. Falls back to the latest post ogImage, then SITE.defaultOgImage.
